For instance, at the 2019 FII, Abu Dhabi’s ADIA and RDIF announced a joint tech investment fund, and China’s CIC sovereign fund joined an infrastructure co-investment with Middle East and Russian partners. BUT maybe the downwards dynamic was also just flow-driven
